name: CDIF4XAS
description: Describing X-Ray Spectroscopy Data for Cross-Domain Use. It enhances the interoperability and reusability of XAS data within EOSC infrastructures using the CDIF framework.

name: ClimateAdapt4EOSC
description: A Horizon Europe initiative creating a seamless, FAIR-compliant research environment for climate adaptation data and services within the European Open Science Cloud (EOSC).

name: Dataverse
description: Open-source research data repository software developed at Harvard IQSS. It enables researchers to share, preserve, cite, and analyze research data with rich metadata support.

name: Nectar
description: The ARDC Nectar Research Cloud provides Australia's research community with self-service interactive computing and storage infrastructure for data-intensive workflows.

name: Deeptime Digital Earth
description: An IUGS-led international program to harmonize global deep-time geodata, creating an interoperable network of geological databases to advance FAIR principles in geoscience.

name: PSDI
description: The Physical Sciences Data Infrastructure (PSDI) connects UK research platforms and services to provide unified access to cross-disciplinary data, software, and models.

name: Data Artifex
description: An open-source Python ecosystem designed to transform raw data into API-powered, machine-actionable knowledge through rapid publication and semantic documentation.
